posts.author: TheGouda
posts.text: Inaccurate capital gains for LIQUIDBEES in Zerodha Tax P&L — We’ve separated EQ and Non-EQ in the Tax P&L report so users can clearly segregate the Taxation bits without much effort. You can download and check for your account. Please DM if you have any doubts.

posts.author: Anuj_Sharma1
posts.text: Inaccurate capital gains for LIQUIDBEES in Zerodha Tax P&L — @siva @TheGouda @Ruchi_Porwal Seems like liquidbees reporting is still broken? The PNL is not displayed in portfolio, so I am assuming when we sell we don’t see it added to the Tax PNL as well? I hope you realise you create a huge burden for your trading users by using these extremely outdated pnl mangagment style of liquidbees (not to mention it is a very popular instrument)
